What's Going on With Twin Vee PowerCats Stock Thursday?
Dow Gains 100 Points; US Retail Sales Rise 0.2% In June
11 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
Twin Vee to merge with Greenland-focused miner USFM
USFM Signs Agreement With Twin Vee PowerCats To Combine Its Subsidiary With, Into Twin Vee; Financial Terms Undisclosed
*Twin Vee PowerCats: Co's Recreational Marine Business Will Be Separated Into a Privately Held Co Prior to Closing, Held Through a Newly Formed Delaware Statutory Trust >VEEE
*Twin Vee PowerCats: Existing Co Stockholders Will Receive Non-Transferable Contingent Value Right Entitling Them to Future Distributions Generated by That Business >VEEE
*Twin Vee PowerCats: Upon Closing, Co Common Stockholders Will Receive Equity in the Combined Public Co >VEEE
*USFM Corp to Combine With Twin Vee PowerCats Co., Creating Publicly Traded Co Focused on Greenland's Disko-Nuussuaq District-Scale Magmatic Nickel-Copper-Cobalt-PGE Project
